dates.summary: ChatGPT’s new personal finance experience is the highest-impact artifact in the cluster, bringing bank-account connectivity, portfolio tracking, subscription monitoring, and AI-guided analysis to U.S. Pro users. OpenAI also pushed Codex further into enterprise workflows with role-specific operating patterns for business operations, data science, and sales teams, while Greg Brockman was formally positioned to lead product as OpenAI reorganizes around the AI agent race.
